name: write-docs
description: Write or improve documentation optimized for knowledge graphs and semantic search

name: organize-docs
description: Analyze files and suggest how to organize them into namespaces for Mindex

name: troubleshoot
description: Search the knowledge base for errors and solutions before answering from training data

name: onboarding
description: Build learning paths from connected documents for new team members

name: audit-docs
description: Audit documentation quality — find duplicates, gaps, orphans, and stale content
